_meta.doc: ACT composer (generator roadmap #4). A run is no longer a flat pool of identical floors — GameAct.compose(seed, length, cfg) lays out a PACED act of typed nodes (monster → elite → treasure → rest → boss), Slay-the-Spire style. The descent stores the composed act on run.act; main.js _genFloor reads the node for the current floor and passes its `gen` modifiers into GameMapGen.generateFloor (encounter density, rest campfire, elite/treasure guarantees). Last node is always the boss. Pure + seeded → replay-safe. Edit the weights/pacing/glyphs here (RPG-Maker-style data) — no code change.
